expectations.text: The agent read tests/test_qa.py, qa_app.py, and the dataset file
expectations.evidence: MEMORY.md documents understanding of all three files in detail: test_qa.py (explains the original runnable), qa_app.py (describes answer_question with LLM call), and the dataset (notes 'eval_output: null' in all items). The fix applied is consistent with reading all three files.

expectations.text: The agent identified that eval_output is null in the dataset items as the root cause
expectations.evidence: MEMORY.md 'Root cause of failures' section explicitly states: 'Because all dataset items have eval_output: null, FactualityEval receives None as the output and scores 0 on every case.' This is the central diagnosis.

expectations.text: The agent made a concrete fix (populated eval_output in dataset OR rewrote test to run the app live OR added from_trace=last_llm_call)
expectations.evidence: tests/test_qa.py was rewritten to use 'run_and_evaluate' per item with 'from_trace=last_llm_call', which captures a live trace from the LLM span. MEMORY.md confirms: 'Fix applied: Replaced assert_dataset_pass with a manual loop using run_and_evaluate per item.'

expectations.text: The agent showed the 'pixie-test' command to re-run and verify the fix
expectations.evidence: MEMORY.md 'To run tests' section shows: 'PYTHONPATH=/home/yiouli/repo/pixie-qa pixie-test tests/test_qa.py -v'

expectations.text: The agent did NOT modify files outside the project directory (especially not /home/yiouli/repo/pixie-qa/pixie/ framework source files)
expectations.evidence: File system check confirms no pixie framework files were modified after the run. MEMORY.md 'Files Modified' section only lists 'tests/test_qa.py' within the project directory.

expectations.text: The agent edited extractor.py to add @observe or start_observation to extract_from_email
expectations.evidence: extractor.py line 15: '@px.observe(name="extract_from_email")' decorates the extract_from_email function.

expectations.text: The agent added enable_storage() to extractor.py (not just px.init())
expectations.evidence: extractor.py lines 9-12: 'from pixie import enable_storage' followed by top-level 'enable_storage()' call.

expectations.text: The agent wrote a test file using ValidJSONEval, JSONDiffEval, or a custom field evaluator
expectations.evidence: tests/test_email_classifier.py line 4: imports 'JSONDiffEval' and uses it in test_classification as the evaluator passed to assert_dataset_pass.

expectations.text: The test file calls enable_storage() inside the runnable (not at module level in the test)
expectations.evidence: tests/test_email_classifier.py lines 9-12: 'def runnable(eval_input):' contains 'enable_storage()' as its first statement, inside the function body.

expectations.text: The agent used 'pixie dataset create' or DatasetStore().create() to create a named dataset
expectations.evidence: build_dataset.py line 78: 'store.create(DATASET_NAME)' creates the 'email-classifier-golden' dataset using DatasetStore.

expectations.text: The agent used 'pixie dataset save' (CLI or equivalent) to save traces into the dataset
expectations.evidence: build_dataset.py lines 80-88: 'store.append(DATASET_NAME, Evaluable(...))' is called for each of the 6 golden items, saving them to the dataset.

expectations.text: The agent created a MEMORY.md or notes file in the project directory
expectations.evidence: MEMORY.md exists at the project directory and documents the entry point, instrumented spans, use cases, datasets, eval plan, and known issues.

expectations.evidence: chatbot.py lines 7-10: 'from pixie import enable_storage' followed by 'enable_storage()' at module level.

expectations.text: The agent created a MEMORY.md or notes file in the project directory
expectations.evidence: MEMORY.md exists at /project/MEMORY.md and contains detailed project documentation including entry points, instrumentation notes, dataset schema, eval plan, and commands.

expectations.text: The agent read tests/test_qa.py, qa_app.py, and the dataset file
expectations.evidence: MEMORY.md documents detailed understanding of all three files: the original test_qa.py (quotes the broken runnable), qa_app.py (notes the @observe decorator and LLM call), and the dataset JSON (quotes 'eval_output: null' as the issue). The fix applied is consistent with having read all three.

expectations.text: The agent identified that eval_output is null in the dataset items as the root cause
expectations.evidence: MEMORY.md 'Bug 2' section states: 'Since the dataset JSON (pixie_datasets/qa-golden-set.json) has "eval_output": null for all items, every call to FactualityEval received output=None and scored 0.' The null eval_output is explicitly named as a root cause.

expectations.text: The agent made a concrete fix (populated eval_output in dataset OR rewrote test to run the app live OR added from_trace=last_llm_call)
expectations.evidence: tests/test_qa.py was rewritten: the runnable now returns the answer (line 16: 'return answer_question(...)'), and the test manually runs the runnable via asyncio.to_thread, builds populated Evaluable objects with live eval_output, then calls assert_pass with those evaluables. This populates eval_output before evaluation.

expectations.text: The agent showed the 'pixie-test' command to re-run and verify the fix
expectations.evidence: MEMORY.md does not show a 'pixie-test' command. The document lists only the modified files and explains the fixes but does not include a run command. No pixie-test invocation is documented anywhere in the project files.

expectations.text: The agent did NOT modify files outside the project directory (especially not /home/yiouli/repo/pixie-qa/pixie/ framework source files)
expectations.evidence: File system check confirms no pixie framework files were modified after the run. MEMORY.md 'Files Modified' section only lists 'tests/test_qa.py' within the project directory.

expectations.evidence: extractor.py line 14: '@observe()' decorates extract_from_email. (Uses 'from pixie.instrumentation import init, observe' and '@observe()' directly.)

expectations.evidence: extractor.py uses 'init()' at line 11 (imported as 'from pixie.instrumentation import init, observe'). There is no enable_storage() call anywhere in extractor.py.

expectations.evidence: test_email_classifier.py has no call to enable_storage() anywhere — not in a runnable function, not at module level. The test functions call extract_from_email directly as the runnable without any enable_storage() setup.

The JSON file appears to have been written directly without using DatasetStore().create(). No CLI commands for dataset creation are shown in MEMORY.md.

expectations.evidence: No build_dataset.py or script using DatasetStore().append() was created. The dataset JSON was written directly as a file. The items have 'eval_output: null', indicating no traces were saved. No 'pixie dataset save' commands appear in MEMORY.md.
